tags.name: retail-redirection
How to buy on Jiomart New
ReactExt
tags.content: const FPI_EXT_FUNC = () => { let events = {}; let unregisteredEmits = []; let id = 0; let HOOKS = { CREATED: 'created', MOUNTED: 'mounted', UPDATED: 'updated', DESTROYED: 'destroyed', WATCH_ROUTE: 'watch.route', }; return { _getSanitizedEH(eventHandlers) { const allHooks = Object.values(HOOKS); return Object.entries(eventHandlers).reduce((ret, [k, v]) => { if (k == 'watch') { ret[k] = v; } else if (!allHooks.includes(k)) { console.warn(`${k} is not a valid hook for FPI.extension.register#hooks`); } else if (typeof v !== 'function') { console.error(`${k} should be a function FPI.extension.register#${k}`); } else { ret[k] = v; } return ret; }, {}); }, emit: function (eventName, el, ...data) { const [hook, watcher] = eventName.split('.'); let callbackExists = false; Object.entries(events).forEach(([target, events]) => { const targetElement = (el instanceof Element && el.matches(target) && el) || el.querySelector(target); if (!targetElement) { return; } callbackExists = true; if (events[hook]) { if (watcher) { events[hook][watcher](targetElement, ...data); } else { events[hook](targetElement, ...data); } } }); if (!callbackExists) { unregisteredEmits = [...(unregisteredEmits || []), { eventName, el, data, },]; } }, register: function (target, eventHandlers) { const sanitizedEH = this._getSanitizedEH(eventHandlers); if (!events[target]) { events[target] = {} } events[target] = { ...sanitizedEH }; if (unregisteredEmits.length) { unregisteredEmits = unregisteredEmits.filter((state) => { const { eventName, el, data } = state; if (!!el.querySelector(target)) { this.emit(eventName, el, ...data); return false; } return true; }); } }, } }; window.FPI_EXT = FPI_EXT_FUNC();FPI_EXT.event = FPI.event;

description.value: Begin your journey by adding unique images and banners. This is your chance to create a captivating first impression. Customize it to reflect your brand's personality and style!
Showcase your top collections here! Whether it's new arrivals, trending items, or special promotions, use this space to draw attention to what's most important in your store.

cta_text.value: Be exclusive, Be Divine, Be yourself

author_testimonial.value: Thank you for the excellent sales support and for contributing to a more humane and sustainable world. The products are of great quality, and it's wonderful to support a brand that cares about ethics and sustainability.

title.value: What People Are Saying About Us

props.label: Disable Compare
props.info: Master kill-switch. When checked, the Compare CTA on PDP, the sticky compare tray, all compare modals, and the getProductComparisonBySlugs SDK call are disabled across desktop and mobile site. Existing localStorage trays are preserved so flipping the switch back on restores user state.

props.label: Hide Compare on Out-of-Stock PDP
props.info: When checked (default), the Compare CTA is hidden on PDPs whose current product is out of stock or unavailable (sellable=false / is_serviceable=false). Uncheck to always show Compare regardless of availability.

props.label: Product Suggestion Limit
props.info: JSON object with msite and desktop keys. E.g. {"msite": 5, "desktop": 8}

props.label: Is there whitelisting enabled?
props.info: This will be used to show the website to limited people

props.label: Image URL Mapping for Each Variant Option
Number of Filters to Show on PLP
Platform Seller ID
props.info: Seller UID used to identify 1P (first-party) platform seller

props.label: Copilot Library Token
props.info: Token for loading the Copilot library from CDN

props.label: Copilot Library URL
props.info: CDN URL template for loading the Copilot library. Use {token} as placeholder for the token.

props.label: Copilot Restricted Pages
props.info: Comma separated list of restricted pages for Copilot

props.label: Haptik Local Storage Key
props.info: Local storage key for Haptik chat integration

props.label: Try Something New Collection
props.info: Collection slug for Try Something New section

props.label: Default Location (JSON)
props.info: JSON object for default address when none is set. e.g. {"country":"INDIA","country_iso_code":"IN","pincode":"400001","city":"MUMBAI","state":"MAHARASHTRA"}

props.label: Default Mumbai Coordinates (JSON)
props.info: Default lat/lng when no geolocation is set. e.g. {"lat":"19.0760","lng":"72.836334"}

props.label: Google Maps API Key
props.info: API key for Google Maps (Places, Geocoding). Used for address autocomplete and map.

props.label: New User Coupon Codes
props.info: JSON array of coupon codes restricted to first-time users only. E.g. ["JMNEW100", "WOW100"]

props.category: Rotating Search Prompt in Search Bar
props.label: Rotating Search Prompt Configuration
Initial rows to show on PLP
props.info: Initial rows to show on PLP for Quick and Shop All

props.label: Google Vertex Configuration
props.info: JSON object with vertex and rra keys. E.g. {"rraEnabled": true, "vertexEnabled": false}

props.label: Brand Strip Configuration
props.info: JSON config for the brand strip shown at the bottom of all sections
props.default: {"enabled":true,"main_title":"JioMart","sub_title":"Time aur paise, dono bachaye!","disclaimer_text":"We do not ask for your bank account or card details verbally or telephonically.","tnc_url":"/page/terms-and-conditions"}

props.label: Rewrite primary-domain navigation links to current origin
props.info: When enabled, navigation URLs whose host matches the application's primary domain (read from the application config API at runtime) are rewritten. Anchor href values are rewritten to a path-only form (/path?query#hash); programmatic navigation (window.location.href / assign / replace, button click handlers) is rewritten to a fully-qualified URL on window.location.origin. URLs on other hosts are left untouched. Toggle off to keep all URLs as-is.

props.default: {"title": "JioMart Blogs", "desc": "Read updates on JioMart's products, offers, and initiatives to stay informed about the latest in your everyday shopping experience."}
props.label: Blog Configuration
props.info: JSON object with Blog keys. E.g. {"title": "JioMart Blogs", "desc": "Read updates on JioMart's products, offers, and initiatives..."}

props.label: Display Bank & EMI Offers
props.info: Display bank and EMI offers on PLP, SLP and Cart pages

props.label: Enable Service Hub
props.info: Show or hide the Service Hub entry in the profile sidebar. Uncheck to disable the feature without removing any other Service Hub settings.

props.label: Service Hub Base URL
props.info: Launch URL for the resQ Service Hub application. Per spec the JWT is appended as ?token=<JWT>. Swap when promoting SIT â UAT â PROD.

props.label: Service Hub Token Query Param
props.info: Query-string key the SSO JWT is appended under in the launch URL (default: jwt).

props.label: Service Hub SSO Claims (JSON)
props.info: JWT claim values that identify this integration. The HS256 secret is NEVER stored here â it lives server-side at the token-generation endpoint. JSON object with iss, aud, destination, isApp.

props.label: Service Hub SSO Source
props.info: Source identifier passed through the SSO flow. Update per originating module/page if multiple entry points are added.

props.label: Service Hub Token Retry Count
props.info: Number of attempts before the SSO token fetch gives up. Clamped to >= 1 at runtime. Plan default: 3.

props.label: Use for Jio Ads

props.label: Use for Moloco Ads
props.info: When enabled (and Jio Ads is off), LPG uses Mobile/Web Moloco config (moloco_ads_lpg_config / web_moloco_ads_lpg_config) at the same positions as Jio slots. Requires Moloco display ads enabled in theme global config.
